## CreateExternalReferenceInput variable

Zod schema for creating a new external reference. Omits system-generated fields (id, timestamps).

**Signature:**

```typescript
CreateExternalReferenceInput: z.ZodObject<
	{} & {
		systemCode: z.ZodString
		refKey: z.ZodString
		refValue: z.ZodString
	},
	'strip',
	z.ZodTypeAny,
	{
		systemCode: string
		refKey: string
		refValue: string
	},

		systemCode: string

		refValue: string
	}
>
```
